free_text: neutron-induced reactions in Al, Au, Bi, Co, F, Na,
protons (20-35 MeV) on Li target (2 mm) and
NaF powder encapsulated with 16 mm in diameter and
High purity (>99.9%) thin foils (25 x 25 mm,
energy resolution of 1.8 keV (FWHM) at 1332 keV
calibrated by a measurement and MCNPX calculation
correction factors from 6 level density models
